mcacrime.card.title: Reputation
mcacrime.command.jail.refused: Cannot jail %s: no jail assigned. Use /crime assignjail or enable jailFallback in config.
mcacrime.command.not_player: This command must be run by a player.
mcacrime.jail.jailed: You have been jailed for %s seconds (online time).
mcacrime.jail.released.served: You have served your sentence and are free to go.
mcacrime.jail.released.cap: You have been released (maximum captivity time reached).
mcacrime.jail.released.admin: You have been released by an administrator.
mcacrime.jail.released.invalid: Your jail no longer exists; you have been released.
mcacrime.fine.disabled: Fines are disabled on this server.
mcacrime.fine.notfinable: Your crimes are too serious to fine away — you must serve jail or surrender.
mcacrime.fine.barred: Outlaws cannot pay a fine until they surrender. Use /crime surrender near a guard.
mcacrime.fine.nothing: You have no fine to pay.
mcacrime.fine.need: You need %s emeralds to pay your fine.
mcacrime.fine.paid: Paid a fine of %s emeralds. You are no longer Wanted.
mcacrime.surrender.noauthority: There is no guard, jail, or lawful authority nearby to surrender to.
mcacrime.surrender.done: You surrender. Your Heat is reduced and any sentence is shortened.
mcacrime.msg.band.blue: Your standing has risen — you are now Lawful (Blue).
mcacrime.msg.band.red: Your standing has fallen — you are now an Outlaw (Red).
mcacrime.msg.witnessed: A villager witnessed your crime — the law has been alerted.
mcacrime.msg.guardaggro.wanted: Guards are pursuing you because you are Wanted.
mcacrime.msg.guardaggro.escaped: Guards are pursuing you as an escaped prisoner.
mcacrime.msg.guardaggro.red: Guards are pursuing you for being a known Outlaw.
mcacrime.msg.guardaggro.captor: Guards are pursuing you for holding a captive.
mcacrime.msg.guardaggro.generic: Guards consider you a lawful target.
mcacrime.kidnap.released.escaped: You broke free of your captor.
mcacrime.kidnap.released.captorgone: Your captor is gone — you are free.
mcacrime.kidnap.released.cap: You have been held long enough — you are free.
mcacrime.kidnap.released.admin: You have been freed by an administrator.
mcacrime.kidnap.released.ransom: A ransom was paid — you have been released.
mcacrime.kidnap.released.died: You died and are no longer captive.
mcacrime.captive.escape.failed: You struggle against your restraints but cannot break free.
mcacrime.capture.not_vulnerable: You can only restrain a target that is vulnerable (low health, asleep, or surrendered).
mcacrime.capture.guard_immune: This guard is too dangerous to restrain right now.
mcacrime.capture.disabled: Capturing that kind of target is disabled on this server.
mcacrime.capture.broken.hit: Your hold was broken — you were struck.
mcacrime.capture.broken.moved: Your hold was broken — you moved too far.
mcacrime.capture.broken.range: Your hold was broken — the target got away.
mcacrime.capture.broken.los: Your hold was broken — you lost sight of the target.
mcacrime.capture.broken.target_lost: Your hold was broken — the target is gone.
mcacrime.ransom.notholding: You are not holding a captive to ransom.
mcacrime.ransom.open: There is already an open ransom for this captive.
mcacrime.ransom.victimgone: Your captive is no longer here.
mcacrime.ransom.cooldown: It is too soon to demand another ransom from this family or village.
mcacrime.ransom.nopayer: No one can be made to pay for this captive.
mcacrime.ransom.village: The village pays a ransom of %s emeralds and your captive is freed.
mcacrime.ransom.demanded: You demand a ransom of %s emeralds for your captive.
mcacrime.ransom.notice: A relative of yours is held captive — pay %s emeralds with /crime payransom to free them.
mcacrime.ransom.none: You have no ransom to pay.
mcacrime.ransom.captoraway: The captor is away — try again when they return.
mcacrime.ransom.need: You do not have enough emeralds to pay the ransom.
mcacrime.ransom.paid: You paid the ransom of %s emeralds; the captive is freed.
mcacrime.ransom.received: Your ransom of %s emeralds was paid; the captive is freed.
mcacrime.ransom.fail.victim: The ransom failed — the captive is gone.
mcacrime.ransom.fail.jailed: The ransom failed — the captive was jailed.
mcacrime.ransom.fail.rescued: The ransom failed — the captive was freed.
mcacrime.mug.disabled: Mugging is disabled on this server.
mcacrime.mug.notarget: There is no villager within reach to rob.
mcacrime.mug.success: You rob the villager of %s emeralds.
